parsed_review.summary: CP00-848 (Risk C, 150 units, RP28.P01.M06.S05-RP28.P02.M02.S22) extends the descriptor-only RP28 Marketplace bridge through the InstallReceipt model slice and the P02 app-submission/review workflow head. Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the pack is well-formed and runtime-closed. Plan/registry/contract reconcile exactly: I hand-counted all 150 live-plan units by deliverable type (implementation 77, ui 23, fixture 4, test 20, hermes_evidence 4, claude_review 7, contract 3, security_audit 6, failure_recovery 6) and by micro-title, matching the prompt baseline, MARKETPLACE_CP848_REQUIREMENTS, and docs/closeout-pack-plan/closeout-pack-plan.json. validators.js strictly rejects runtime execution, install-receipt emission, permission/audit/product-state writes, and secret/PII payloads; every createRow plus MARKETPLACE_NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION keep those flags false, and the contract tail validation block (valid:true, latest_pack_id CP00-848, all runtime flags false) matches the generated projection in registry.js. Authority boundary is intact: descriptors encode claude_is_final_approval:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false; Hermes packets are control-plane review evidence only (emits_runtime_receipt:false, writes_product_state:false). No false production_ready/enterprise-trust claim exists: manifest, construction-inspection, adjudication, and command-evidence all correctly report production_ready:false / runtime_ready:false / PENDING_REVIEW. Review harness is hardened (tools Read,Grep,Glob; read_only:true; auth preflight exit 0 with non-empty valid JSON; summary-only correctly prohibited for Risk C with security/review deliverables). One P3 informational item: command-evidence.json records only 2 of the 10 expected validation commands, so production_ready promotion correctly remains gated on the full suite plus this single valid review receipt. No P0/P1/P2 findings; this review does not block CP00-848 closeout. Final human approval for enterprise-trust opening is closed outside this receipt and is not a blocker here.

findings.title: Full validation suite still pending in command-evidence; production_ready correctly not yet claimed
findings.details: command-evidence.json (status: pending_full_validation) records only two commands as passed: rp28:marketplace:validate (exit 0) and node --test packages/marketplace/test/*.test.js (exit 0). The ten expected closeout validation commands (closeout-pack-plan:validate, closeout-pack:validate, npm test, validate, spec:requirements:validate, weighted:validate, fullplan:validate, goal:closeout:validate, rp00:control-plane:validate, git diff --check) are not yet recorded as passed. manifest.json (production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false), construction-inspection.json (PENDING_REVIEW), and adjudication.md all correctly withhold the production_ready claim, so this is the expected pre-closeout state rather than a defect. As a read-only reviewer I cannot execute these commands; the gating is correctly documented in adjudication.md.
findings.recommendation: Before promoting production_ready, run and record the complete validation suite; keep closeout blocked until all listed commands pass and exactly one valid hardened read-only review receipt (this one) is attached, as already required by adjudication.md and construction-inspection.json.
findings.post_review_disposition: Expected gate, not a defect. production_ready remains correctly false; promotion stays contingent on full-suite execution by the closeout process.
